title: "Kimi K1.5 Technical Report"
date: 2026-04-20

categories:
  - RL
  - LLM
description: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    title-block-style: default
---

![](images/kimi-k1.5-report.png){fig-align="center" width="100%" fig-alt="Teaser image for the Kimi K1.5 technical report"}

## Overview

Draft notes for the `Kimi K1.5` report.
